contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Per-credential QR + PDF, per surface — Phase 3a complete
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/146
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-engine/pull/9
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/112
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_prod/pull/4
  
  Details:
  Phase 3a of the per-program credentialing platform — every credential page surface now carries its own QR code with the appropriate logo in the centre and a downloadable PDF that embeds the same QR.
  
  Architecture (spec'd in agentic_ai_context/CREDENTIALING_PROGRAM_PAGES.md §15):
  
    truesight.me/credentials/#<slug>                                  TrueSight logo  (canonical, existing)
    truesight.me/programs/tribomirim/credentials/#<slug>              Tribo Bahia logo  (new)
    truesight.me/programs/butterfly-effect/credentials/#<slug>        ERA Professionals logo  (new, stand-in until Bilal sends a Butterfly Effect-specific logo)
  
  Each QR encodes the production URL of its specific surface (decoded via pyzbar to confirm). The matching PDF embeds the QR so a printed copy resolves to the same place.
  
  Four PRs across four repos:
  
    1) agentic_ai_context#146 (squash a3f4229) — §15 Phase 3a spec.
       URL shape, naming convention (slug__url-program-slug), vendoring rules (logos live in lineage-engine for build determinism + audit-on-diff, not fetched from truesight_me manifest URLs), regen trigger (existing lineage-credentials GH Action), graceful fallback rules, sub-phase rollout.
  
    2) lineage-engine#9 (squash 9bc503b) — build_cv_cache.py extension.
       New: scripts/program_assets/{registry.json, tribomirim/logo.png, butterfly-effect/logo.png}. Registry maps data-side cv.programs[] key (capoeira-tribo-mirim) to URL-side slug (tribomirim) — explicit because the slug spaces diverge.
       render_qr() now accepts optional logo_path so the canonical + per-program QRs share one codepath.
       Per-CV loop iterates cv.programs after the canonical write, looks up URL slug via registry, emits sibling artifacts if a logo is vendored. Silent warn-and-skip otherwise.
  
    3) lineage-credentials — auto-rebuilt via existing GH Action.
       I triggered the workflow manually (gh workflow run build-cv-cache.yml) to bring the new artifacts live immediately. Run 25973684307 succeeded; gary-teh__tribomirim.qr.png + .pdf committed to main.
  
    4) truesight_me_beta#112 (squash ce5df87) and truesight_me_prod#4 (squash f11b7c3).
       js/program-shell.js renderCredential() now appends a 'Scan this credential' section: QR image at 180x180 (140 on narrow viewports), production URL printed below in copyable code, '⬇ Download credential PDF' button.
       Fetch resilience: jsDelivr primary → raw.githubusercontent fallback → canonical slug.qr.png final fallback (graceful per spec §15.5).
       Artifact filename uses manifest.program_slug (URL-side) not the data-side cv.programs[] key — matches the on-disk naming.
  
  Live verification (https://truesight.me/programs/tribomirim/credentials/#gary-teh, post-deploy):
    QR src     = cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/TrueSightDAO/lineage-credentials@main/_cache/cv/gary-teh__tribomirim.qr.png
    QR natural = 530px (full lineage-engine output)
    PDF href   = cdn.jsdelivr.net/.../gary-teh__tribomirim.pdf
    Hint shows correct production URL
    Zero console errors
  
  Decoded the live QR earlier via pyzbar — payload is exactly https://truesight.me/programs/tribomirim/credentials/#gary-teh.
  
  What this unlocks:
    - Bilal can hand out physical certificates with QR codes that resolve to a co-branded ERA / Butterfly Effect profile on truesight.me as soon as he supplies the cohort + a Butterfly Effect-specific logo.
    - The canonical credentials page already carries its TrueSight-logo QR; the program-scoped pages now do too.
    - Regen happens automatically on every push to lineage-credentials (existing GH Action). No new infrastructure.
  
  Out of scope (intentionally):
    - Co-brand chrome on the PDF body — Phase 3a kept the PDF visual identical to canonical; only the QR differs. Phase 3b can add partner-branded PDF templates if needed.
    - cert_compiler.py (printed-cert batch generation) — defers until Bilal has a real cohort to print.
    - Butterfly Effect logo refinement — currently using ERA Professionals' main brand mark as a stand-in. Replace with a Butterfly Effect-specific logo when supplied; one-file commit in lineage-engine, next rebuild picks it up.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------

Verify submission here: https://dapp.truesight.me/verify_request.html
rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
